ddls:
CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome record */,
  "subgroup" TEXT /* The biological subgroup of the cancer (e.g., ER+HER2+) */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of cancer (e.g., Early, Advanced) */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment administered (e.g., None, Tamoxifen, Chemotherapy) */,
  "HR" REAL /* Hazard Ratio associated with the treatment */,
  "prop_historical" REAL /* Proportion of historical response rates */,
  "prop_contemp1999" REAL /* Proportion of contemporary response rates (1999) */,
  "prop_perfect" REAL /* Proportion of perfect treatment response */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the study protocol */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Actual response rate of the patient */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the treatment outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_stage FOREIGN KEY ("stage") REFERENCES stages ("stage_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES study_protocols ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_treatment FOREIGN KEY ("treatment") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_subgroup FOREIGN KEY ("subgroup") REFERENCES patients ("subgroup")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at diagnosis */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of cancer diagnosis */,
  "subgroup" TEXT /* Biological subgroup of the cancer */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of cancer */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Any comorbidities the patient has */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "BMI" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "menopause_status" TEXT /* Menopause status of female patients */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment type */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment (e.g., Tamoxifen, Chemotherapy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment method */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Side effects associated with the treatment */,
  "contraindications" TEXT /* Contraindications for the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage (e.g., Early, Advanced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "TNM_classification" TEXT /* TNM (Tumor, Node, Metastasis) classification */,
  "cancer_type" TEXT /* Type of cancer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., oncologist, data analyst) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study protocol */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study methodology */,
  "date_approved" TEXT /* Date when the protocol was approved */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "ethical_approval" TEXT /* Ethical approval status */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study protocol associated with the access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Last date the researcher accessed the data */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES study_protocols ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
